description:
Good news! Entrance prices are staying the same as last year! And now the Advance tickets now available to buy on-line.

Meetings have been started once again in preparation for the planning of this years beer fest.  Bands have been booked and prices agreed on.
Glasses ordered. Beers being researched and posters being designed. Buy your entrance tickets on line and don’t forget to get your drinks tokens at the same time to avoid those queues!
Equipment ordered and Bands have been confirmed.  Please see Entertainment page for the 2025 band list.
Final meeting before the actual event held tonight.  Questions and kinks all ironed out.  Bring on the festival!
Please remember if you have a couple of hours to spare Wednesday night (9th July) pop up and help with the set-up. Fences and marquees etc need erecting.
Sponsor list updated - please visit Sponsor Tab for our heroes!
Advance tickets now no longer available but remember we do take card at the festival.
Thank you to all those that came up to the festival site tonight to help put up marquees, fencing, bar, tables and many more things.  Nearly ready for it to begin!

Wow! What a weekend.  It was hot which caused various problems but it’s better than rain!  After a very busy Sunday clearing up the site the committee are exhausted but very happy the festival was a success.  Thank you to all the volunteers as we couldn’t have done it without you!
Meetings have started and entrance prices agreed.
This year Saturday theme is **Down on the Farm**.
[Camping registration form now available to book your camping.](https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSczKZgcVQyzllXyRiDzlN2Y7n29PqDDNf6sczvFDjHjnVLKVg/viewform?pli=1)
[Advanced tickets now on sale here](https://ashcott-beer-festival.sumupstore.com) or check the Tickets tab.
This is a test post too.
